title: dialium platysepalum
intro: Dialium platysepalum, also known as the African horse shoe tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dialium platysepalum include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of Dialium platysepalum typically include decoctions or infusions of the leaves, bark, or roots, which are often used to make teas, tinctures, or capsules.
